              have : 1 < P.M ∨ P.M = 1 := Nat.lt_or_eq_of_le (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.succ_le_succ (Nat.zero_le _))
                ) |> Or.inr
              exact Nat.succ_pos _)) (le_trans (Nat.zero_le _) (le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_succ_self _) hm_le_n))))
          exact this) hm_le_n
        exact Nat.factorization_le_factorization_of_dvd hm_dvd p
      exact Multiset.sum_le_sum fun m hm => hIco_le m hm
    have hbal : (P.initial.balance p : ℤ) ≤ P.M * (P.n.factorial.factorization p) := by
      unfold Factorization.balance Factorization.sum
      have := sub_le_sub_right (show (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤ P.M * (P.n.factorial.factorization p) from this)
        (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ)
      simpa [Int.ofNat_mul, Int.ofNat_sum] using this
    have hfact_le : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) ≤ Real.log P.n := by
      have hn_pos : (0 : ℝ) < P.n := by
        have : 0 < P.n := lt_trans P.hL_pos (lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos) P.hL.le)
        exact_mod_cast this
      have hp_pos : (0 : ℝ) < p := by exact_mod_cast hprime.pos
      have hp_le_n : (p : ℝ) ≤ P.n := by
        have : (p : ℝ) ≤ Real.sqrt P.n := hp
        have hs : (Real.sqrt (P.n : ℝ)) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by
          have hn1 : (1 : ℝ) ≤ P.n := le_of_lt (lt_of_lt_of_le (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) < 1) hn_pos.le)
          simpa using Real.sqrt_le_self hn1
        exact this.trans hs
      have hval_le : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by
        have : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℕ) ≤ P.n := by
          simpa using Nat.factorization_factorial_le P.n p
        exact_mod_cast this
      exact le_trans hval_le (le_of_lt (by simpa [hn_pos] using Real.log_lt_self hn_pos))
    have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log P.n := by
      have hbal' : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) := by
        exact_mod_cast hbal
      nlinarith [hbal', hfact_le]
    exact this
  · simp [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, hprime]

by_cases hprime : p.Prime
  · have : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤ P.M * (Real.log P.n) + P.n.factorial.factorization p := by
      have hnonneg : 0 ≤ (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum := by exact Nat.zero_le _
      have hpos : 0 ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
        by_cases hn : P.n = 0
        · simp [hn]
        · have hn1 : (1 : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by
            exact_mod_cast (Nat.succ_le_iff.mpr (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn))
          have : 0 ≤ Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := Real.log_nonneg hn1
          nlinarith
      exact le_trans (by
        have : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤ (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum := le_rfl
        exact le_trans this (by nlinarith)) (by
          have : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤ (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum := le_rfl
          nlinarith)
    unfold Factorization.balance Factorization.sum
    have hfac : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) ≤ P.n.factorial.factorization p := by
      exact le_rfl
    have hsum_nonneg : (0 : ℤ) ≤ (P.initial.a.map (fun m ↦ m.factorization p)).sum := by
      exact Int.ofNat_nonneg _
    have hsum_le : ((P.initial.a.map (fun m ↦ m.factorization p)).sum : ℝ) ≤
        (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) + (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) := by
      exact_mod_cast this
    have : ((P.initial.a.map (fun m ↦ m.factorization p)).sum : ℤ) -
        (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
      have : ((P.initial.a.map (fun m ↦ m.factorization p)).sum : ℝ) -
          (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
        linarith
      exact_mod_cast this
    exact this
  · simp_all [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum]

have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n := by
    by_cases hprime : p.Prime
    · have : (P.initial.balance p : ℤ) ≤ (P.M * (Nat.log p P.n) : ℤ) := by
        unfold Factorization.balance Factorization.sum
        have h0 : (0 : ℕ) ∉ P.initial.a := fun h ↦ (P.initial.hpos 0 h).false
        have hs : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤
            P.M * (∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (Nat.log p P.n + 1), P.n / p ^ k) := by
          set S := Multiset.join (Multiset.replicate P.M (Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n))
          have hle : P.initial.a ≤ S := by unfold Params.initial; aesop
          have hval : ∀ m ∈ S, m.factorization p ≤ ∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (Nat.log p P.n + 1), P.n / p ^ k := by
            intro m hm
            have hm_le_n : m ≤ P.n := by
              simp only [S, Multiset.mem_join, Multiset.mem_replicate] at hm
              obtain ⟨_, ⟨_, rfl⟩, hs⟩ := hm
              rw [Multiset.mem_Ico, tsub_le_iff_right] at hs
              exact hs.2.le
            by_cases hm0 : m = 0
            · simp [hm0]
            · have hp0 : p ≠ 0 := hprime.ne_zero
              have hpow0 : ∀ k, p ^ k ≠ 0 := fun k ↦ pow_ne_zero _ hp0
              have hdiv_pos : ∀ k, 0 < k → 0 < p ^ k := fun k hk ↦ pow_pos hprime.pos _
              have hlog_le : m.factorization p ≤ Nat.log p P.n := by
                have : p ^ (m.factorization p) ∣ m := ordProj_dvd _ _
                have hmpos : 0 < m := pos_of_ne_zero hm0
                have : p ^ (m.factorization p) ≤ m := le_of_dvd hmpos this
                have : p ^ (m.factorization p) ≤ P.n := this.trans hm_le_n
                exact Nat.le_log_of_pow_le (by exact_mod_cast hprime.one_lt) this
              have hterm_pos : P.n / p ^ (m.factorization p) ≥ 1 := by
                have hp_pow_dvd : p ^ (m.factorization p) ∣ P.n := by
                  exact dvd_trans (ordProj_dvd _ _) (dvd_trans (dvd_refl m) (dvd_of_le hm_le_n))
                have : p ^ (m.factorization p) ≤ P.n := le_of_dvd (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by
                  exact hpow0 _)) hp_pow_dvd
                exact Nat.one_le_div_iff.mpr (by
                  refine le_trans ?_ (Nat.mul_div_le_self P.n (p ^ (m.factorization p)))
                  exact Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (hpow0 _)))
              have hsum_ge : (∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (Nat.log p P.n + 1), P.n / p ^ k) ≥
                  P.n / p ^ (m.factorization p) := by
                have hmem : m.factorization p ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (Nat.log p P.n + 1) := by
                  refine Finset.mem_Ico.mpr ?_
                  have : 1 ≤ m.factorization p := by
                    by_cases hfac0 : m.factorization p = 0
                    · simp [hfac0]
                    · exact Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hfac0)
                  exact ⟨this, Nat.lt_succ_iff.mpr hlog_le⟩
                exact le_trans (by
                  simpa [hmem] using (Finset.single_le_sum (fun _ _ ↦ Nat.zero_le _) hmem))
                  (le_of_eq rfl)
              exact le_trans (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_succ_self _) hsum_ge))
                (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.lt_succ_self _))
          have hsub : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤ (S.map (·.factorization p)).sum :=
            Multiset.le_iff_exists_add.mp hle |>.elim fun k hk ↦ by simp [hk]
          have : (S.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤
              (S.map fun _ ↦ ∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (Nat.log p P.n + 1), P.n / p ^ k).sum :=
            Multiset.sum_map_le_sum_map _ _ (by intro m hm; exact hval m hm)
          have hconst : (S.map fun _ ↦ ∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (Nat.log p P.n + 1), P.n / p ^ k).sum =
              P.M * (∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (Nat.log p P.n + 1), P.n / p ^ k) := by
            simp only [S, map_join, sum_join, map_replicate, Multiset.sum_replicate, smul_eq_mul]
            congr 1
            simp [Multiset.Ico]
          exact (le_trans hsub this) |>.trans_eq hconst
        have hlegendre : (P.n.factorial).factorization p =
            ∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (Nat.log p P.n + 1), P.n / p ^ k := by
          rw [factorization_def]
          · have := Fact.mk hprime; rw [padicValNat_factorial]; simp
          · exact hprime
        have hb : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum - (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) ≤
            P.M * (Nat.log p P.n) := by
          have hsum' : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤
              P.M * (∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (Nat.log p P.n + 1), P.n / p ^ k) := hs
          have hsum'' : ((P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum : ℤ) ≤
              (P.M * (∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (Nat.log p P.n + 1), P.n / p ^ k) : ℤ) := by
            exact_mod_cast hsum'
          rw [hlegendre] at hsum''
          have : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum - P.n.factorial.factorization p ≤
              P.M * (Nat.log p P.n) := by
            have : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤
                P.n.factorial.factorization p + P.M * (Nat.log p P.n) := by
              have hlen : (∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (Nat.log p P.n + 1), P.n / p ^ k) ≤ Nat.log p P.n := by
                have : (∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (Nat.log p P.n + 1), P.n / p ^ k) ≤
                    (Finset.Ico 1 (Nat.log p P.n + 1)).card * (P.n / p) := by
                  refine Finset.sum_le_card_nsmul ?_ ?_
                  · intro k hk; exact Nat.zero_le _
                  · intro k hk
                    have hk' : 1 ≤ k := (Finset.mem_Ico.mp hk).1
                    have : p ^ k ≥ p := by
                      simpa [pow_one] using Nat.pow_le_pow_right (Nat.le_of_lt hprime.one_lt) hk'
                    exact Nat.div_le_div_left (Nat.le_of_lt hprime.pos) this
                have hcard : (Finset.Ico 1 (Nat.log p P.n + 1)).card = Nat.log p P.n := by
                  simp
                have : (Finset.Ico 1 (Nat.log p P.n + 1)).card * (P.n / p) ≤ Nat.log p P.n * P.n := by
                  nlinarith [Nat.div_le_self P.n p]
                exact le_trans (le_trans this (by simp [hcard])) (by simp)
              have : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤ P.n.factorial.factorization p + P.M * Nat.log p P.n := by
                have := hsum'
                nlinarith [hlen]
              exact this
            omega
          exact this
        exact hb
      have hlog : (P.M * (Nat.log p P.n) : ℝ) ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n := by
        have hn0 : (P.n : ℝ) ≠ 0 := by
          have : P.n > 0 := lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos) P.hL.le
          exact_mod_cast this.ne'
        have hp1 : (p : ℝ) ≥ 1 := one_le_cast.mpr (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by
          exact hprime.ne_zero)))
        have : (Nat.log p P.n : ℝ) ≤ Real.log P.n := by
          have hn1 : (1 : ℝ) ≤ P.n := by
            have : 1 ≤ P.n := Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by
              exact_mod_cast hn0))
            exact_mod_cast this
          have : (Nat.log p P.n : ℝ) ≤ Real.logb p P.n := by
            exact_mod_cast Nat.cast_log_le_real_logb (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp hprime.one_lt)
          have : Real.logb p P.n ≤ Real.log P.n := by
            by_cases hp0 : (p : ℝ) = 1
            · simp [Real.logb, hp0]
            · have hp_pos : (0 : ℝ) < p := cast_pos.mpr hprime.pos
              have hp_ne1 : p ≠ (1 : ℝ) := hp0
              have hlogp : 0 < Real.log p := by
                have : 1 < (p : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hprime.one_lt
                simpa using Real.log_pos this
              have : Real.logb p P.n = Real.log P.n / Real.log p := by simp [Real.logb, hp_pos.ne']
              rw [this]
              have hden : 1 ≤ Real.log p := le_of_lt hlogp
              have hpos : 0 ≤ Real.log P.n := Real.log_nonneg hn1
              nlinarith
          exact le_trans (le_trans this this) this
        nlinarith
      have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n := by
        exact le_trans (by exact_mod_cast this) hlog
      exact this
    · simp [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, hprime]
  exact_mod_cast this
